nasb.text: If I am wicked, woe to me! And if I am righteous, I dare not lift up my head. I am sated with disgrace and conscious of my misery.

esv.text: If I am guilty, woe to me! If I am in the right, I cannot lift up my head, for I am filled with disgrace and look on my affliction.

cnv.text: 我若有罪，就有禍了； 我若有理，也不敢抬頭， 飽嘗羞辱，看看自己的苦難。

ccb.text: 我若有罪，便遭祸患； 即使清白，也不敢抬头， 因为我饱尝羞辱，吃尽苦头。
